game_name: Best of the Best: Championship Karate

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based fighting rhythm with escalating opponent difficulty across tournament progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: Beginner opponents with limited move sets; focuses on tutorial mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Intermediate opponents with expanded move libraries; introduces special techniques
difficulty_curve.late_game: Advanced championship-level opponents with complex AI patterns and special moves

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear advancement through ranked opponents with increasing difficulty; each victory unlocks next opponent
Each successive opponent introduces refined AI, additional move variations, and improved defensive mechanics

data_limitations: Source material contains only ROM analysis (MIDI data extraction) with no documented gameplay, level design, or progression flow information. Element introduction order and difficulty curve derived from standard fighting game tournament paradigm conventions rather than explicit design documentation.
